description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a prominent rear spoiler. The body is finished in a metallic silver color, complemented by black accents on the roof, window trim, and lower body panels. The front features aggressive air intakes, a sculpted hood with vents, and sharp, angular headlights. Large, multi-spoke alloy wheels with visible disc brakes and low-profile tires enhance its sporty appearance. The rear showcases quad exhaust outlets, circular taillights, and a wide stance, emphasizing its performance-oriented design. The side profile reveals a two-door configuration, flush door handles, and a fastback roofline that flows smoothly into the rear deck.
description: A silver, high-performance coupe car with a fastback roofline, black accents, large alloy wheels, and a prominent rear spoiler. It features aggressive styling, quad exhausts, and a two-door layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sculpted hood, angular headlights, and wide grille with air intakes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the fastback roofline, two-door layout, large alloy wheels, and black roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the quad exhaust outlets, circular taillights, rear spoiler, and wide stance.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the coupe's profile, wheels, and aerodynamic lines.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
